name: emptystate
title: EmptyState
description: Centered empty view — leads with the action, not the absence.

files.content:
Centered empty view — leads with the action, not the absence.

```jsx
<EmptyState bordered icon="folder" title="Create your first project"
  description="Projects group keys, environments, and usage."
  action={<Button iconLeft="plus">New project</Button>} />
```
